nasb.text: This is the thing which you shall do: one third of you, of the priests and Levites who come in on the sabbath, shall be gatekeepers,

esv.text: This is the thing that you shall do: of you priests and Levites who come off duty on the Sabbath, one third shall be gatekeepers,

cnv.text: 你們要這樣行：你們中間每逢安息日來值班的祭司和利未人，三分之一要把守各門；

ccb.text: 你们要这样做，三分之一在安息日值班的祭司和利未人要把守各门，
